summary_en: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些投资有助于提升密苏里州的经济和技术实力，促进社区发展。
why_it_matters_en: These investments help enhance Missouri's economic and technological capacity, fostering community development.

summary_zh: 在2026年谷歌I/O大会上，我们发布了Gemini Omni、谷歌反重力、通用购物车等多项创新产品和技术。以下是重点内容。
summary_en: At Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and many more innovative products and technologies. Here are the highlights.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些发布展示了谷歌在人工智能和创新领域的前沿探索，标志着未来科技发展的重要方向。
why_it_matters_en: These announcements showcase Google's cutting-edge advances in AI and innovation, marking key directions for future technology development.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: 100 Things We Announced at I/O 2026. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 新实验提升Google Beam群组会议体验
title_en: A New Experiment Brings Better Group Meetings to Google Beam
summary_zh: 通过真实大小和声音看到并听到同事，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和连贯性。
summary_en: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
why_it_matters_zh: 此实验通过增强视觉和声音效果提升会议体验，适应远程和现场混合办公需求。
why_it_matters_en: This experiment enhances meeting experience with improved visual and sound effects, catering to hybrid remote and onsite work needs.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A New Experiment Brings Better Group Meetings to Google Beam. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 立场声明：开发数据探针以从根本上理解数据如何影响大型语言模型性能
title_en: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance
summary_zh: 数据是大型语言模型（LLM）的基础。然而，理解哪些数据对LLM工作流程中不同阶段（包括训练、调优、对齐和上下文学习）有用及其原因，仍是一个未解之谜。当前方法主要依靠对大型公开数据集进行大量实验以获得数据过滤和构建的数据集的经验启发，计算资源消耗大且缺乏对数据特性如何驱动LLM行为的本质理解。本文呼吁开发系统性方法，通过适当定义的随机过程生成合成序列，这些序列作为数据探针，在LLM工作流程的一个或多个阶段使用时，可揭示有用特性。通过观察LLM对数据探针的表现，研究者能系统地研究数据特性如何影响模型性能、泛化和鲁棒性。这些探针序列展示了可以用理论概念（如广义典型集）描述的统计特性，为理解数据在LLM训练和推理中的作用提供新的基础性见解，超越经验启发。
summary_en: Data is fundamental to large language models (LLMs). However, understanding what makes certain data useful at different stages of the LLM workflow—training, tuning, alignment, in-context learning—and why, remains an open question. Current methods rely heavily on extensive experimentation with large public datasets to derive empirical heuristics for data filtering and dataset construction, which is computationally intensive and lacks principled understanding. This paper advocates developing systematic methodologies to generate synthetic sequences from well-defined random processes, termed data probes, which reveal useful characteristics when used during various LLM workflow stages. Observing LLM behavior on these probes allows researchers to systematically study how data traits influence performance, generalization, and robustness. The probes exhibit statistical properties interpretable by theoretical concepts like generalized typical sets. This approach offers a pathway to foundational insights into data's role in LLM training and inference beyond empirical heuristics.
why_it_matters_zh: 开发数据探针有助于从理论及实践层面深入理解特定数据特性的影响，从而破解当前依赖大规模实验的局限，为数据驱动的模型优化提供科学依据。
why_it_matters_en: Developing data probes enables a deeper, theoretically grounded understanding of how specific data characteristics affect LLM behavior, overcoming current heavy reliance on large-scale experiments and providing a scientific basis for data-driven model improvements.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 部署文档AI：用于OCR和大型语言模型流水线的微服务架构
title_en: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production
summary_zh: 该论文介绍了一种微服务架构，集成了分类、光学字符识别（OCR）和大型语言模型结构化字段提取的多模型流水线，能够处理每小时数千份多页文档。文章详细阐述了设计决策，如混合分类、GPU推理与CPU协调分离、异步处理以及独立的水平扩展策略。研究发现OCR成为端到端延迟的主要瓶颈，系统并发度受共享GPU资源限制而非工作线程数量，提供了可行的生产级文档理解系统架构模式。
summary_en: This paper presents a microservice architecture integrating pipelines of multiple models for classification, OCR, and large language model structured field extraction, capable of processing thousands of multi-page documents per hour. Key design choices include hybrid classification, separation between GPU inference and CPU orchestration, asynchronous IO-bound processing, and independent horizontal scaling. Findings reveal OCR dominates latency and system concurrency is limited by shared GPU inference capacity rather than worker count, providing practical architectural patterns for production-ready document understanding systems.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究弥补了学术界模型设计与实际大规模生产部署之间的鸿沟，针对文档理解系统的性能瓶颈和扩展机制提供了实用方案，帮助工程师构建高效、可扩展的AI文档处理流水线，推动AI在企业级应用中的落地。
why_it_matters_en: The work addresses the gap between academic model development and large-scale production deployment, offering practical solutions for performance bottlenecks and scalability in document understanding systems. It aids engineers in building efficient, scalable AI document pipelines, advancing the real-world adoption of AI in enterprise applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 评估个人健康记录在个性化健康人工智能中的应用价值
title_en: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI
summary_zh: 本研究评估了大型语言模型（Gemini 3.0 Flash）在利用个人健康记录（PHRs）临床数据作为上下文，回答用户健康查询的潜力。使用来自三种不同查询分布的2257个用户问题并匹配1945份去标识PHRs，比较了模型在无PHR、基础信息摘要及完整临床笔记三种情境下的回答。评估显示，加入PHR数据显著提升答案的帮助性、安全性、准确性、相关性和个性化。研究还揭示了模型在理解复杂PHRs时存在的时间顺序混淆及罕见不实生成问题，提出了相应的评估框架。结果表明PHR数据可广泛支持用户健康需求，并推动深化利用健康记录的研究。
summary_en: This study evaluates the potential of large language models (Gemini 3.0 Flash) to answer health queries when provided clinical data from patient-managed Personal Health Records (PHRs) as context. Using 2,257 user queries from three distributions matched with 1,945 de-identified PHRs, responses were generated under three conditions: no PHR, basic summaries, and full clinical notes. The evaluation, including clinician ratings, showed significant improvements in helpfulness, safety, accuracy, relevance, and personalization when PHR data was included. The study also identified issues like temporal disorientation and rare confabulations in model interpretations. These findings highlight the promise of PHR data to better support diverse patient needs and provide a framework to monitor model gaps in PHR-based answers.
why_it_matters_zh: 个人健康记录包含丰富且复杂的临床信息，利用大型语言模型解析这些数据能帮助患者更好地理解自身健康状况，提升健康管理能力。研究证明结合完整PHR信息回答问题，能显著提升答案质量，这对推动个性化医疗和患者赋能具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: Personal Health Records contain rich and complex clinical information; leveraging large language models to interpret these data can empower patients to better understand and manage their health. The study demonstrates that incorporating full PHR data significantly enhances answer quality, which is crucial for advancing personalized healthcare and patient empowerment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 闪亮故事，隐藏的挣扎：通过大型语言模型视角探讨残疾的呈现
title_en: Shiny Stories, Hidden Struggles: Investigating the Representation of Disability Through the Lens of LLMs
summary_zh: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）如何通过模拟残疾人士的社交媒体发帖来呈现残疾群体。分析表明，LLMs往往理想化残疾人的经历，产生过于积极的刻板印象，未能真实反映他们的生活现实。同时，LLMs存在对残疾人与非残疾人在职业和娱乐等话题上的负面偏见，强化了排斥性叙事，误导公众认知。该研究强调了对LLMs中边缘群体表现的批判性审视的必要性。
summary_en: This paper investigates how Large Language Models (LLMs) represent disability by simulating social media posts from individuals with disabilities. The analysis reveals that LLMs often idealize the experiences of disabled people, generating overly positive stereotypes that fail to authentically capture their lived realities. Additionally, LLMs display negative bias by associating topics like career and entertainment more with nondisabled individuals, reinforcing exclusionary narratives. The findings highlight the need for critical scrutiny of how LLMs represent marginalized groups.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着LLMs在社会交互中的应用增多，理解它们如何描绘残疾群体至关重要，以防止偏见扩散和误导社会认知，保障边缘群体的真实声音被反映。
why_it_matters_en: As LLMs are increasingly used in social interactions, understanding their portrayal of disability is crucial to prevent the spread of bias and misinformation, ensuring that marginalized voices are authentically represented.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Shiny Stories, Hidden Struggles: Investigating the Representation of Disability Through the Lens of LLMs. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 利用大型语言模型进行情感分析：Decentraland的MANA代币多模态分析
title_en: Leveraging Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis: Multi-Modal Analysis of Decentraland's MANA Token
summary_zh: 本文研究了去中心化虚拟现实平台Decentraland中MANA代币的价格预测，结合了Discord社区情感和多模态金融数据。通过基于BERT的大型语言模型进行情感分析，构建了两个LSTM架构，充分利用了社区情感分数、交易量和市值。结果显示，多模态模型在预测准确性上显著优于仅基于价格的模型，表明社区情绪信号对于虚拟经济预测具有重要价值。
summary_en: This study investigates price prediction of Decentraland's MANA token by integrating Discord community sentiment analysis with multi-modal financial data. Employing a BERT-based large language model for sentiment, two LSTM models were developed incorporating sentiment scores, trading volume, and market cap. Results show the multi-modal approach significantly outperforms price-only baselines, highlighting the predictive value of community-derived signals in virtual economy forecasting.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究结合自然语言处理和虚拟经济数据，展示了社区情感分析在加密货币价格预测中的应用潜力，助力虚拟世界经济研究发展。
why_it_matters_en: The study demonstrates how combining NLP-based sentiment analysis with financial indicators enhances cryptocurrency forecasting, paving the way for future research at the intersection of immersive virtual worlds and AI-driven market analysis.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Leveraging Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis: Multi-Modal Analysis of Decentraland's MANA Token. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 基于代理推理链调优的长上下文推理
title_en: Long-Context Reasoning Through Proxy-Based Chain-of-Thought Tuning
summary_zh: 最近的大型语言模型支持多达一千万个标记的输入，但在需要复杂推理的长上下文任务上表现不佳。这些任务通常只需使用输入的子集——代理上下文，而非全文序列。针对代理上下文和全文上下文间显著的性能差异，本文提出了ProxyCoT训练框架，通过强化学习或教师模型蒸馏在代理上下文中获取高质量的推理链条，再在全文上下文中进行监督微调，从而将推理能力转移到长上下文。多数据集实验表明，ProxyCoT表现优于强基线且计算开销更低，且训练模型能推广到领域外任务上。
summary_en: Recent large language models support inputs of up to 10 million tokens but struggle on long-context tasks requiring complex reasoning. These tasks can be solved using only a proxy context, a subset of the input, rather than the full sequence. To address the large performance gap between proxy and full contexts, this paper proposes ProxyCoT, a training framework that transfers reasoning abilities from short proxy contexts to full long contexts. It first acquires high-quality chain-of-thought reasoning on proxy contexts via reinforcement learning or distillation from a larger teacher model, then grounds these chains in full contexts through supervised fine-tuning. Experiments show ProxyCoT consistently outperforms strong baselines with lower computational cost and generalizes well to out-of-domain tasks.
why_it_matters_zh: ProxyCoT通过先在简短代理上下文中强化推理链条，再将其迁移至长上下文，提升了模型处理超长输入时的推理能力，解决了长文本复杂推理中性能下降的问题，具有较高实际价值。
why_it_matters_en: ProxyCoT improves long-context reasoning by leveraging learning from shorter proxy contexts, addressing the performance drop in handling ultra-long inputs with complex reasoning. This enables more effective processing of lengthy sequences with reduced computational burden, making it practically valuable.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Long-Context Reasoning Through Proxy-Based Chain-of-Thought Tuning. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_en: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
summary_zh: OpenAI推进“教育为国家”计划，通过新合作、教师培训和工具，促进AI在学校的应用，提升全球学习成果。
summary_en: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一阶段加强了全球教育系统对AI技术的整合，旨在提升教学质量和学生学习成绩。
why_it_matters_en: This phase strengthens the integration of AI technology into global education systems to enhance teaching quality and student learning outcomes.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OpenAI模型驳斥离散几何核心猜想
title_en: An OpenAI Model Has Disproved a Central Conjecture in Discrete Geometry
summary_zh: OpenAI模型解决了困惑数学界80年的单位距离问题，驳斥了离散几何中的一项重大猜想，标志着AI驱动数学的新里程碑。
summary_en: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一突破展示了AI在解决复杂数学问题上的潜力，推动了数学研究的新方向。
why_it_matters_en: This breakthrough demonstrates AI's potential to solve complex mathematical problems, advancing new directions in mathematical research.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An OpenAI Model Has Disproved a Central Conjecture in Discrete Geometry. Category: models_products. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: 开放AI推出新加坡多年度人工智能合作伙伴关系，旨在扩大部署规模，培养本地人才，并支持企业和公共服务实现AI赋能。
summary_en: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
why_it_matters_zh: 此合作体现了开放AI致力于推动地区AI发展和创新的战略，助力新加坡成为AI应用和人才培养的领先中心。
why_it_matters_en: This partnership reflects OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI development and innovation regionally, helping Singapore become a leading hub for AI applications and talent nurturing.

title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型家族
title_en: OlmoEarth v1.1: A More Efficient Family of Earth Observation Models
summary_zh: Hugging Face 博客介绍了 OlmoEarth v1.1，这是一个更新版本的地球观测模型系列，具有更高的效率，旨在提升遥感数据处理和分析能力。
summary_en: The Hugging Face Blog introduces OlmoEarth v1.1, an updated family of Earth observation models that offers improved efficiency aimed at enhancing remote sensing data processing and analysis capabilities.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着地球观测数据量激增，更高效的模型能够更快更准确地处理这些数据，支持环境监测和相关科研工作。OlmoEarth v1.1的推出响应了这一需求。
why_it_matters_en: As the volume of Earth observation data grows rapidly, more efficient models are essential for faster and more accurate data processing, supporting environmental monitoring and related research. OlmoEarth v1.1 addresses this need.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OlmoEarth v1.1: A More Efficient Family of Earth Observation Models. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 介绍 Ettin 重新排序器家族
summary_zh: Hugging Face 发布了 Ettin 重新排序器家族，这是一组用于自然语言处理任务的先进重新排序模型，旨在增强模型在信息检索和排序任务中的表现。
summary_en: Hugging Face has introduced the Ettin Reranker Family, a set of advanced reranking models designed to improve performance in natural language processing tasks such as information retrieval and ranking.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一新工具家族通过提升排序准确度，帮助开发者更好地构建和优化搜索及推荐系统，推动NLP技术进步。
why_it_matters_en: This new family of tools enhances ranking accuracy, aiding developers in building and optimizing search and recommendation systems, advancing NLP technology.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用Transformers后端运行OCR和文档解析任务
title_en: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
summary_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5发布，支持通过Transformers模型后端执行光学字符识别(OCR)及文档解析任务，提升灵活性和性能。
summary_en: PaddleOCR 3.5 has been released, enabling OCR and document parsing tasks to be performed using a Transformers backend, enhancing flexibility and performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 这个更新利用了Transformers模型的强大能力，使得OCR和文档理解任务更加高效，适应更多复杂场景。
why_it_matters_en: This update leverages the powerful capabilities of Transformer models, making OCR and document understanding tasks more efficient and adaptable to complex scenarios.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
